actual_output:
Hi there! I would be happy to check on that status for you. 

Since I don't have your account details pulled up just yet, could you please provide a little more information? Your **ticket number**, the **email address** associated with your account, or a brief description of the issue would be perfect. 

Once I have that, I'll look into it right away and get you an update!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot acknowledges the request and asks for the necessary identifying information required to provide a specific status update, which is a standard and helpful support procedure.
